creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Please do this repocopy:
www/firebug -> www/firebug15

It's approved by maintainer (please see ports/155891 comments for details).
www/firebug15 will hold firebug version for firefox3/seamonkey, while www/firebug will hold version for firefox4. 

After the repocopy patch from ports/155891 should be applied to www/firebug.
And please set me as maintainer for this new port (www/firebug). Current maintainer seems to not have objections. 

Thanks.
